title: dicymanthes cuernosensis
intro: Dicymanthes cuernosensis is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Cunoniaceae and is commonly known as the "Philippine Dicymanthes" or "Cuernos Dicymanthes". The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Dicymanthes cuernosensis is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots are often used in traditional medicine.
